description: Complete service interface contract from Entity Framework 6

methods.name: FindCatalogItem
methods.description: Fetch single catalog item by ID with navigation properties loaded

methods.name: GetCatalogItemsPaginated
methods.description: Fetch paginated catalog items with total count

methods.name: CreateCatalogItem
methods.description: Insert new catalog item into database
methods.side_effects: Assigns ID to catalogItem via HiLo generator, persists to database

methods.name: UpdateCatalogItem
methods.description: Update existing catalog item in database

FindCatalogItem.python_signature: async def find_catalog_item(self, db: AsyncSession, item_id: int) -> CatalogItem | None

GetCatalogBrands.python_signature: async def get_catalog_brands(self, db: AsyncSession) -> list[CatalogBrand]

GetCatalogItemsPaginated.python_signature: async def get_catalog_items_paginated(self, db: AsyncSession, page_size: int, page_index: int) -> PaginatedItemsViewModel

GetCatalogTypes.python_signature: async def get_catalog_types(self, db: AsyncSession) -> list[CatalogType]

CreateCatalogItem.python_signature: async def create_catalog_item(self, db: AsyncSession, item: CatalogItem) -> CatalogItem

UpdateCatalogItem.python_signature: async def update_catalog_item(self, db: AsyncSession, item_id: int, updates: dict) -> CatalogItem
UpdateCatalogItem.sqlalchemy_pattern: Fetch item, modify properties, await db.flush()

RemoveCatalogItem.python_signature: async def delete_catalog_item(self, db: AsyncSession, item_id: int) -> None

transaction_behavior.legacy: Each SaveChanges() wraps operation in implicit transaction
transaction_behavior.migration: Each route handler wraps in session.commit() via get_db_session() dependency

disposal_pattern.legacy: IDisposable pattern - DbContext disposed after operation
disposal_pattern.migration: async context manager - AsyncSession yielded and auto-closed
